name: Brine for Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a container large enough to hold the whole chicken.
2. Mix well until salt, sugar, garlic, bay leaves, peppercorns, and herbs are completely dissolved.
3. Rinse the whole roasting chicken thoroughly, ensuring to remove any giblets or loose parts from the cavity.
4. Submerge the chicken in the brine mixture.
5. Refrigerate for 18 to 24 hours.
6. Remove the chicken from the brine before roasting according to your usual method.
